name: mofa-videolizer
description: Generate SRT subtitles from text + audio using Whisper or basic timing

tools.name: videolizer_subtitles
tools.description: Generate an SRT subtitle file from a script text file and an audio file. Uses Whisper for word-level timestamps when available, falls back to basic even-spread timing.

text_path.description: Path to the script text file

audio_path.description: Path to the audio file (WAV, MP3, etc.)

output_path.description: Path to save the generated .srt file
